title: PROMISE #1 NEVER INTRODUCED — TERM LIMITS FOR CONGRESS
title_alt: TOP OF THE 100-DAY PLAN. ZERO BILLS.
TERM LIMITS — THE FIRST PROMISE NEVER TRIED
BROKEN: Term Limits for Congress | SEALED
description:
Term limits for Congress sat at the top of the 2016 Contract with the American Voter — promise number one on the 100-day plan. Four years later: zero bills proposed by the administration, zero pressure on committees, zero floor votes asked for.

The book grades it BROKEN — not because the idea failed, but because the idea never got tried.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=term-limits

#politics #trump #congress #shorts #factcheck
